problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
